ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "subregion" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion */,
  "population" TEXT /* Current population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "governance_type" TEXT /* Type of governance (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicator is recorded */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, Inflation Rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the ranking is recorded */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., GDP, Human Development Index) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ranking data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "total_countries" INTEGER /* Number of countries in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  "total_countries" INTEGER /* Number of countries in the subregion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the subregion data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., country_id, indicator_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data source (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "last_validated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the link entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
